title: Pixel Accurate [Let's Do] Bakery
description: This resource pack changes the textures of placed foods in [Let's Do] Bakery mod.
body: Have you ever been stunned by the beautiful item texture in [Let's Do] Bakery mod, but the textures of placed foods don't feel right? This pack is here to fix it! It changes many textures of placed bread to some new ones that looks just like the item texture.
